children.heading: Commission authority
children.label: b Commission authority
children.text: The Commission shall promulgate such rules and regulations to carry out as it deems necessary or appropriate in the public interest or for the protection of investors.section 77s(b) of this title

children.heading: No effect on Commission powers
children.label: c No effect on Commission powers
children.text: Nothing in this Act, including this section and the amendment made by this section, shall be construed to impair or limit the authority of the Commission to establish accounting principles or standards for purposes of enforcement of the securities laws.

children.heading: Study and report on adopting principles-based accounting
children.label: d Study and report on adopting principles-based accounting

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Commission shall conduct a study on the adoption by the United States financial reporting system of a principles-based accounting system.

children.label: i
children.text: the extent to which principles-based accounting and financial reporting exists in the United States;

children.label: ii
children.text: the length of time required for change from a rules-based to a principles-based financial reporting system;

children.label: iii
children.text: the feasibility of and proposed methods by which a principles-based system may be implemented; and

children.label: iv
children.text: a thorough economic analysis of the implementation of a principles-based system.

children.heading: Report
children.label: 2 Report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Commission shall submit a report on the results of the study required by paragraph (1) to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Financial Services of the House of Representatives.July 30, 2002
